title: Filipino Values Among Surigaonon Youth in View of Florentino Timbreza
author: Jerobem B. Galgao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study is all about Florentino Timbreza's concept of Filipino values among the Surigaonon youth in terms of attitude and extent of practice towards Filipino religiousity, Filipino family orientation, and Filipino hospitality. This study utilized a quantitative descriptive design using a survey method to gather input and acquire more specific and quantitative information. The participants’ range of ages is between 15 and 26 years old. The researcher used the purposive sampling method to gather responses, which leads to better insights and more precise research results. The data gathered were organized, tallied, and analyzed using Microsoft Excel and IBM SPSS Statistics Version 22. Results represent the significance of the profiles of the participants and their attitudes and practices about Filipino values in terms of Filipino religiosity, Filipino family orientation, and Filipino hospitality. It was found out that there is a significant relationship between the attitude and extent of practices of Surigaonon youth towards Filipino values in terms of Filipino religiosity, Filipino family orientation, and Filipino hospitality. Thus, having positive attitude toward something will result to a high practice.
